AI ENGINEER · MECHATRONICS · ESTADO DE MEXICO, MX

Engineering intelligenceintelligence
into machines.

I build the layer between algorithms and actuators: robotics planning at Siemens, an autonomous industrial maintenance robot, vision models past 98% accuracy, LLM workflows in production. Open to AI and robotics engineering roles, in English, Spanish, or German.

See the work Email Sebastian

Selected work

Five projects and the record behind them. Every panel is a procedural figure, dithered live on the canvas; hover or tap any one to read it.

FIG. 01 Assembly-by-disassembly planning

Assembly-by-disassembly planning

SIEMENS, MUNICH · 2025 · PYTHON · C# · RL · SIEMENS NX

Plans how a product is assembled by computing how it comes apart: automated sequence generation and pruning, path-finding with ML-RRT, D* and reinforcement learning, and AI-generated instructions exported to VR in Siemens NX. A Fourier-transform method estimates solution density across the inverse-kinematics configuration space, cutting placement computation time sharply.

FIG. 02 Embedding clustering

Embedding clustering

SIEMENS · 2025 · LLM · EMBEDDINGS · CLUSTERING

LLM- and embedding-based workflows that harmonize the extracted diagram data: semantic deduplication, similarity search and clustering over thousands of components into clean, queryable groups.

Awards

Awards

  • National CENEVAL Award, EGEL+ IMECATRO2025
  • DAAD-KOSPIE Scholarship, Germany2024
  • Google AI Professional Certificate2026
  • HarvardX CS50AI, Python2020
  • RoboCup Rescue, Best Presentation, Japan2017
FIG. 03 RoboMop, autonomous maintenance robot

RoboMop, autonomous maintenance robot

ITESM + DASVENT · 2025 · C++ · PYTHON · SLAM · WEBSOCKETS

The full software stack for an autonomous mobile robot working industrial floors: concurrent real-time systems in C++ and Python, 2D occupancy-grid SLAM, and sensor fusion under strict time-synchronization constraints. Coverage path-planning handles navigation and obstacle avoidance; a React and Node.js interface streams live maps over WebSockets for monitoring and remote teleoperation.

Experience

Experience

  • AI Research Scientist Intern, Siemens · Munich2025
  • B.S. Mechatronics, Tecnológico de Monterrey2025
  • Exchange semester, TU Dresden · DAAD-KOSPIE2024
  • Manufacturing cell + VR twin, Rockwell2024
  • Front-End Developer Intern, La Brújula2024
FIG. 04 Vision-guided 4-DoF robot arm

Vision-guided 4-DoF robot arm

ITESM · 2024 · OPENCV · C++ · ESP32 · IK

A pick-and-place arm driven end to end: real-time OpenCV detection with fiducial-based positioning, geometric inverse kinematics for a 4-DoF arm and wrist, and ESP32 firmware in C++ exposing a Wi-Fi socket server with state acknowledgments and over-the-air updates. A single Python loop closes camera capture, planning, communication and execution.

FIG. 05 Single-line diagram digitization

Single-line diagram digitization

SIEMENS, MUNICH · 2025 · PYTORCH · YOLO · LLM · REACT

A custom-architecture YOLO model and computer-vision system that turns electrical single-line diagrams into structured digital data at over 98% detection accuracy, paired with a React tool stakeholders use to curate, cleanse, review and visualize the results.
